incident_response_statement: Security incidents are triaged per docs/security/incident-response.md and private disclosure per SECURITY.md; operators preserve logs and rotate credentials before public disclosure.
ledger_durability_statement: Append-oriented audit ledgers use tenant-scoped storage with integrity checks; durability and backup expectations are documented in docs/security/audit-ledger-security.md and are operator-owned outside this manifest.

operational_probes.description: Structured security and trust diagnostics (docs, CI wiring, Makefile, examples).
operational_probes.name: security_trust_check

operational_probes.description: Validates this manifest and referenced trust document paths.
operational_probes.name: validate_trust_manifest

operational_probes.description: Validates cryptographic trust artefacts under trust/ and examples/trust/.
operational_probes.name: trust_chain_check

operational_probes.description: Aggregated OSS gate including security-trust, trust-manifest, and OSS diagnostics checks.
operational_probes.name: enterprise_readiness_check

security_controls.description: Bearer API keys and secret injection patterns for deployments.
Tenant boundaries for ledger-backed operations derive from server-side API key mapping.
Fail-closed governance when evidence, approvals, or integrity checks do not succeed.
Audit ledger integrity, export controls, and backup considerations.

tenant_isolation_statement: Ledger tenant context for security-sensitive routes is resolved from server-side API key to tenant mapping (for example GOVAI_API_KEYS_JSON); client project headers are metadata and must not be treated as the sole isolation boundary. See docs/security/tenant-isolation.md and SECURITY.md.
